name: Appetizer Kabobs
recipeIngredient: Wrap 1-inch cubes of sharp processed American cheese in partially cooked slices of bacon.
Wash fresh mushrooms (do not soak or peel); alternatively, use canned mushroom crowns.
Alternate bacon cheese cubes and mushrooms on skewers with stuffed green olives and cocktail weiners. Leave a little space between tidbits on the skewer.
recipeInstructions:
1. Thread the bacon cheese cubes and mushrooms onto skewers, alternating them with stuffed green olives and cocktail weiners. Space the items evenly on the skewer.
2. Place the skewers over coals and cook until the bacon and mushrooms are crispy and the cheese is melted.
3. Brush the mushrooms with melted butter or margarine while cooking.
4. Serve with catsup, mustard, or soy sauce if desired.
